questions.question: An API experiences a 20% increase in usage over the next quarter. If the current average request rate is 1000 RPS, what can be predicted about the future capacity requirements of the API?
questions.hint: Consider the impact of the increase in usage on the API's capacity needs

questions.question: A company's API usage follows a pattern of high usage during peak hours (9am-5pm) and low usage during off-peak hours. If the average usage during peak hours is 5000 RPS, what trend can be predicted about the API's capacity requirements?
questions.hint: Consider the cyclical nature of the API usage and its impact on capacity planning

questions.question: An organization has implemented a caching mechanism to reduce the load on its API. If the caching mechanism is effective in reducing the number of requests to the API by 30%, what trend can be predicted about the future capacity requirements of the API?
questions.hint: Consider the impact of the caching mechanism on the API's capacity needs
